name: security
appliesWhen: agent role is security-reviewer OR any task touching auth, data, secrets, or external input

officialRepos.name: OWASP/ASVS
officialRepos.why: Application Security Verification Standard — concrete, testable security requirements by level.

officialRepos.name: OWASP/CheatSheetSeries
officialRepos.why: Authoritative how-to for injection, authn, JWT, CSRF, SSRF, secrets, RLS-style isolation.

officialRepos.name: colinhacks/zod
officialRepos.why: Allowlist input validation at the trust boundary; .strict() rejects unknown fields.

officialRepos.name: cure53/DOMPurify
officialRepos.why: Vetted HTML sanitizer for the rare case untrusted rich text must be rendered.

officialRepos.name: gitleaks/gitleaks
officialRepos.why: Pre-commit and CI secret scanning to keep credentials out of VCS.

officialRepos.name: google/osv-scanner
officialRepos.why: Dependency/supply-chain vulnerability scanning gated in CI.
